commands.command: scoped public-safety wording scan over node 18 code/schema/evidence
commands.summary: no forbidden affirmative promotion or RSI wording found; production-readiness.sh was checked by added-line diff scan because it intentionally contains unsafe phrases in negative-test fixtures

commands.command: go build ./cmd/atlas && rm -f atlas && test ! -e atlas

repair_notes: PR #345 initially failed GitHub CI because Windows checkout line endings changed the source prompt markdown digest used by the compaction-resume-regression fixture.
Added a red/green regression for LF versus CRLF prompt digest stability and canonicalized prompt markdown line endings before hashing.

PR #345 then exposed a Windows CI wait-state in the final readiness public-safety scan; added a red/green regression requiring tracked-file enumeration and changed the scan file list from working-tree find to git ls-files.
